scripts.postinstall: find ./node_modules/expo-modules-jsi/apple -name '*.swift' -exec sed -i '' 's/nonisolated(unsafe) //g' {} \; 2>/dev/null; find ./node_modules/expo-modules-jsi/apple -name '*.swift' -exec sed -i '' 's/weak let/weak var/g' {} \; 2>/dev/null; find ./node_modules/expo-modules-jsi/apple -name '*.swift' -exec sed -i '' 's/weak var runtime/nonisolated(unsafe) weak var runtime/g' {} \; 2>/dev/null; true
